description: Input JSON accepted by the local no-network/no-wallet/no-execution Agent Trust Bundle CLI and HTTP surfaces.

intended_integration_context.description: Buyer/consumer supplied description of where Agent Trust would sit in the agent loop before a risky tool, API, or payment-like action.

ledger.description: Optional local mock ledger rows used only for deterministic policy quote accounting.

policy.description: Flexible x402 policy object. Common fields include agent_id, allowed_resources, per_request_cap, per_agent_budget_cap, and settlement.

provenance_evidence.description: Optional discovery/identity provenance evidence, including DNS-AID/ANS-style claims. Evidence only; not authorization or trust by itself.

tool_descriptor.description: Optional tool/MCP descriptor or list/string descriptor inspected without network calls or execution.

title: Agent Trust Bundle request v1
